---
title: "VDS2526"
author:
  - "Sofiya Antonyuk (2467715)"
  - "Benedict Pierret TAA NGUIMBIS ESSEME (2261512)"
  - "Viktor Szabó (2503521)"
  - "Ferenc Wimmer (2469928)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
print("Hello World")
```
